GENERIC_ERROR: An error occurred! Please check the inputs.
COMMAND_ERROR: An error occurred while executing the command.
NO_PERMISSION: You do not have sufficient permissions to use this command! (Required Level: {level})
ONLY_GUILD_ERROR: This feature only works in servers.
ONLY_AUTHOR_CAN_USE: Only the command author can use this menu!
NOT_YOUR_MENU: Only the command author can use this menu!
NOT_USER: Only the command author can control this menu 🚫
SLASH_ONLY: ⚠️ This command can only be used via Slash Commands (/).
CMD_DESC_HELP: Lists available commands and their descriptions.
HELP_DESC: Listed below are the commands you can use. Type `{prefix}command` for details.
HELP_MAIN_TEXT:
Hello! I am **Visually**. An advanced entertainment and moderation bot.

Use the menu below to explore my commands.

❓ **Support:** Use `/invite` to join our support server.

[Privacy Policy](https://github.com/xMrKerem/visually?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-privacy-policy-gizlilik-politikas%C4%B1)
[Terms of Service](https://github.com/xMrKerem/visually?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-terms-of-service-hizmet-%C5%9Fartlar%C4%B1)
CAT_MOD_DESC: Admin commands to manage the server.
CAT_SYS_DESC: Configure bot settings for the server.
CMD_DESC_SETTINGS: Changes bot settings (language, prefix) for the server.
SETTINGS_DESC: You can change Visually's settings for this server here.
PREFIX_MISSING: Please enter a new prefix. (e.g., !settings prefix .)
PREFIX_TOO_LONG: Prefix can be at most 3 characters.
CMD_DESC_DUEL: It allows you to have a 1v1 battle with whoever you want.
DUEL_QUE_FAIL: It's not your turn! Wait for your opponent.
NO_MANA_ULTRA: Not enough Mana! You need **100 Mana** for Special Technique.
DUEL_SPECIAL_FAIL: **{attacker}** tried Special Technique but failed to focus!
NO_MANA_HEAL: Not enough Mana! You need **40 Mana** to heal.
DUEL_HEAL: **{attacker}** used a potion and restored **{heal}** HP.
DUEL_NOT_FOR_YOU: This request is not for you!
DUEL_MENTION_FAIL: Please mention a user or provide an ID to duel.
CMD_DESC_STORE: A market where you can buy items with coins to crush your opponents in duels.
STORE_MAIN_DESC: Buy items for a huge advantage in duels! Use the menu below to browse through all categories.
STORE_MAIN_TEXT: What are you looking for? I have the best goods if you have the coin. 😎
STORE_SHIELD_DESC: Armors and energy shields to help you survive heavy hits from your opponent.
STORE_SHIELD_TEXT: If you don't like getting beaten up, you're in the right place. Which shield shall I wrap up for you?
STORE_EQUIP_DESC: Deadly tools that allow you to deal much more damage without mercy.
STORE_EQUIP_TEXT: The best defense is a good offense, buddy. Pick your weapon, no mercy! 🔥
STORE_TECH_DESC: Technological enhancements to change the fate of the duel in seconds.
STORE_TECH_TEXT: You can't be a champion with just basic punches. If you want to learn deadly new techniques, pay up. Which skill shall we unlock? 😎
STORE_COMMING_SOON: 🛠️ **Duel Store is coming soon!** We are currently stocking the shelves... Stay tuned! 😎
STORE_HEAL_DESC: Potions you can use to restore your health.
NOT_USER_OR_ITEM: ❌ An error occurred: User or item not found.
ENOUGH_BALANCE: ❌ **Insufficient Balance!** You don't have enough coins to buy this item.
ITEM_OWNED: ❌ **Already Owned!** You cannot buy this item again as it is permanent.
SUC: ✅ **Success!** The item has been added to your inventory.
DAILY_COOLDOWN: ⏳ You already claimed your daily reward! Come back in **{hours}h {minutes}m**.
CMD_DESC_LEADERBOARD: See the strongest fighters of the server.
LEADERBOARD_EMPTY: 📭 No data in this category yet.
CMD_DESC_KICK: Kicks a user from the server.
KICK_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to kick.
KICK_FAIL: ❌ Could not kick the user. Check my permissions.
CMD_DESC_BAN: Bans a user from the server.
BAN_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to ban.
BAN_FAIL: ❌ Could not ban the user. Check my permissions or role hierarchy.
UNBAN_INVALID_ID: ⚠️ Please enter a valid User ID (Numbers only).
UNBAN_FAIL: ❌ Could not unban. User might not be banned or ID is invalid.
CMD_DESC_MUTE: Times out a user for a duration.
MUTE_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to mute.
MUTE_TOO_LONG: ⚠️ Duration too long! Max limit is 28 days.
MUTE_FAIL: ❌ Failed to mute. Check my permissions or role hierarchy.
CMD_DESC_UNMUTE: Removes the timeout from a user.
UNMUTE_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to unmute.
CLEAR_INVALID: ⚠️ Please enter a number between 1 and 100.
CLEAR_FAIL: ❌ An error occurred (Messages might be older than 14 days).
CMD_DESC_AUTOROLE: Automatically assigns a role to new members.
WELCOME_USAGE_ERROR: ⚠️ Invalid usage! Example: `!welcome welcome #channel` or `!welcome goodbye #channel`
WELCOME_INVALID_CHANNEL: ⚠️ Invalid channel! Please mention a valid text channel.
WARN_INVALID_USAGE: ⚠️ Invalid usage! Use `/warn add`, `/warn list` or `/warn delete`.
WARN_FAIL_SELF: ⚠️ You cannot warn yourself or the bot!
WARN_NO_ID: ⚠️ Please specify the warning ID to delete (e.g. `A7X2`).
WARN_NOT_FOUND: ❌ No warning found with this ID.
WARN_DELETED: 🗑️ Warning with ID `{id}` has been deleted.
CMD_DESC_WEATHER: Shows detailed weather information for a specified city.
LOADING_DATA: Data is being collected and analyzed...
RAIN_CONTINUING: Precipitation is currently ongoing and will last for about **{duration} minutes**.
RAIN_STARTING: Precipitation will start in **{start} minutes** and last for **{duration} minutes**.
NO_RAIN_EXPECTED: No precipitation expected for the next hour.
CMD_DESC_STATS: Shows technical data of the bot.
INVITE_DESC: Use the buttons below to invite me or join our support server.
CMD_DESC_SAY: Makes the bot say a message.
SAY_NO_TEXT: ⚠️ Please enter a message to say.
SAY_RESTRICTED: 🛡️ For security reasons, you cannot make the bot mention `@everyone` or `@here`!
AI_ERROR: My brain is a little fried right now... Can you try again later?
CMD_DESC_SLANG: Enables or disables the bot's slang/casual mode.
INVALID_SLANG_ARG: ❌ Please provide a valid option: `on` or `off`.
SLANG_ENABLED: 😎 **Slang Mode Enabled!** I'll be more casual, chill, and use some slang now.
SLANG_DISABLED: 🧐 **Slang Mode Disabled.** I will now speak formally and politely.
INVENTORY_EMPTY:
Your bag is empty! It's gathering dust... 🕸️
Go to the store (`/store`) and buy something.
CMD_DESC_EQUIP: Equips an item from your inventory.
SLASH_DESC_EQUIP: Item name or ID (e.g. Iron Sword or A7X9)
EQUIP_NO_ARG: ⚠️ Please provide the name or ID of the item.
ITEM_NOT_FOUND_INV: ❌ Item not found in your inventory.
ITEM_DELETED_DB: ❌ Error: This item has been removed from the database.
EQUIP_ERR: ❌ Error: This item cannot be equipped or has an invalid category.
STORE_CHEST_DESC: Try your luck! Browse chests that may contain rare items.
STORE_EMPTY_DESC: It looks like the merchants are out of stock or restocking their shelves. Please check back later!
CMD_DESC_REMOVEITEM: Permanently removes an item from the store.
SLASH_DESC_REMOVEITEM_ID: The ID code of the item to remove (e.g., chestWooden)
REMOVE_NOT_FOUND: An item with the ID `{id}` could not be found.
REMOVE_SUCCESS: **{item}** (ID: `{id}`) was successfully removed from the store.
REMOVE_FOOTER: No one can buy this item anymore.
CMD_DESC_UNEQUIP: Unequip an item from a slot and return it to your inventory.
UNEQUIP_NO_ARG: ❌ Please specify an equipment slot to unequip (weapon, shield, tech, potion).
INVALID_SLOT: ❌ Invalid slot type! Please choose one of: `weapon`, `shield`, `tech`, `potion`.
UNEQUIP_SUCCESS: You successfully unequipped **{item}** from your **{slot}** slot.
DUEL_REVIVE_PHOENIX: ❤️‍🔥 **MIRACLE!** {player} has been revived by Phenex Tears!
CMD_DESC_OPENCHEST: Open a chest from your inventory.
VOTE_CHEST_DESC: Vote for the bot on top.gg, then press the check button. If your latest vote has not been claimed yet, your Vote Chest will be added to your inventory.
VOTE_CHEST_PENDING: No unclaimed top.gg vote was found yet. Vote first, then press the check button.
VOTE_CHEST_CLAIMED: Your reward has been delivered: **{item}** was added to your inventory.
CHEST_OPEN_NO_ARG: Please enter the chest name or ID you want to open.
CHEST_NOT_IN_INV: That chest is not in your inventory.
CHEST_NOT_FOUND: The chest data could not be found in the store.
CHEST_OPEN_FAIL: The chest could not be opened. Please try again later.
EFFECT_REGEN_HEAL: 💚 **{player}** restored **{amount}** HP with their healing aura!
EFFECT_STUNNED: 💫 **{player}** is stunned and cannot make a move this turn!
STRIKE_LIFESTEAL: ✨ **{player}** drained **{amount}** HP with their holy sword!
STRIKE_SHOCK_DOT: ⚡ **{player}** was scorched by lightning and will continue to burn!
STRIKE_DESTROY_EQUIP: 💥 **{player}** shattered the opponent's defense entirely with the power of destruction!
STRIKE_STEAL_ATTACK: 🤍 **{player}** halved the opponent's power with Divine Dividing and added it to themselves!
MOVE_MULTI_HIT: ⚔️ **{player}** forged a new sword and dealt a DOUBLE STRIKE!
MOVE_IGNORE_DEFENSE: 🗡️ **{player}** bypassed the opponent's shield and struck directly at their soul!
MOVE_HOLLOW_PURPLE: 🟣 **HOLLOW: PURPLE!** Everything in its path was atomized!
MOVE_BREAK_GUARD: 🔴 **TECHNIQUE REVERSAL: RED!** The opponent's guard was shattered!
MOVE_CLEANSE_DEBUFFS: 💧 **{player}** cleansed all debuffs with Reverse Cursed Technique!
DUEL_BROKEN_ITEMS: ⚠️ <@{user}>, due to the intensity of the battle, these items broke/depleted: **{items}**
SERVER_INFO_ERROR: Server information could not be retrieved.
